title: BBL Routers
description: A fully wireless item, fluid and energy transportation mod
body:
# __**Routers**__

## __**Overview**__

BBL Routers is a powerful Item, Fluid and Energy transportation mod allowing for wireless transporting of items in your world. Adds the Importer which attaches to an inventory you want to insert into. An Exporter which is connected to an inventory you wish to extract from and the Router Connector, used to connect Importers to Exporters.

Exporters and Importers can be filtered for both item stack and fluids stacks support JEI dragging as well. 

## __**Integration**__

Has support for Mekanism Gases, Ars Source and more

## __**Support**__

Join the BBL [Discord](https://discord.gg/benbenlaw) for support, report bugs and suggest features or additions. You can also support me on [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/benbenlaw) to gain Alpha access to Modpacks and Mods in dev
